overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dark underground industrial tunnel with cyan accent lighting and rocky walls. The player approaches a lit container area and continues toward two NPCs working at a workstation near the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial tunnel with cyan emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark tunnel toward a distant bright exit

rough rocky cave walls with industrial support structures
metal walkway grating covering the tunnel floor
bright light source visible at the end of the dark tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark industrial tunnel illuminated by cyan emergency lights on the ceiling. The rocky walls and metal grating floor are visible as the viewer walks steadily toward a distant bright exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial container storage passage with bright side lighting

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into brightly lit container passage with side lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial containers in a lit corridor

stacked metal containers lining the passage walls
bright natural or artificial light streaming in from side openings

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a brighter section, the scene reveals industrial containers including one marked 'GEO-CORE' on the right. Side lighting illuminates the cracked concrete floor as the camera continues walking past the storage equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit tunnel section approaching distant figures

events.description: lighting dims significantly entering darker tunnel section past the containers
two human figures become visible standing ahead near a workstation

agents.ego_description: walking through darker tunnel section toward distant figures

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near containers in the distance ahead

entered.detail: faint lights visible at the end of the dark passage
scattered rubble and broken concrete on the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The tunnel darkens again as the camera proceeds through a dimly lit passage. Two human figures become visible in the distance ahead, standing near what appears to be a workstation, while faint lights mark the tunnel continuation.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial workstation with two workers inspecting containers

events.description: slowing down as approaching the two NPCs at the workstation
NPC in yellow vest interacts with container control panel while other observes

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing two NPCs working at a container workstation

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest gesturing toward container controls
worker in dark clothing observing the equipment

entered.detail: industrial control station with panels and screens
large industrial containers stacked near the workstation
metal cabinet with buttons and interfaces

segments.scene_description: Approaching the two NPCs, the scene reveals an industrial workstation with containers and control panels. One worker in a yellow safety vest gestures toward the equipment while the other observes, as the camera slows and stops near them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark industrial tunnel that transitions from a sterile, dimly lit corridor into a functional workspace. It begins by moving through a rocky passage illuminated by cyan emergency lights on the ceiling and metal grating underfoot, heading steadily toward a distant glow. As the camera emerges into a brighter section, the environment opens up to reveal industrial containers, including one marked GEO-CORE, set against a cracked concrete floor. The scene then shifts back into a dimly lit passage where two human figures appear in the distance, drawing the camera forward through the shadows. Finally, the movement slows and stops as the camera reaches an industrial workstation, where a worker in a yellow safety vest gestures toward control panels and equipment.
